positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic woodland creature, perhaps an illuminated fox or a crowned stag, surrounded by swirling bioluminescent flora and delicate geometric patterns. The style should be a blend of art deco symmetry and modern botanical etching, emphasizing thick, clean outlines and negative space. The palette should focus on deep forest greens, sapphire blues, burnished gold, and creamy ivory, using strong contrast for a striking silhouette effect. Central composition, perfect for a chest print on apparel, isolated on a clean, textured background. High detail, perfect for screen printing.
